name: Corn Pone
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten eggs, one at a time, then add milk.
3. Sift together the corn meal, flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet mixture in another bowl.
5. Pour the batter into a hot, greased pan.
6. Bake for about 20 minutes until golden brown and firm to the touch.
Note: Assume a moderate oven temperature of 350 - 400°F.
